//: Phase 3.2: scripts/*.ts were ported from .js as a mechanical rename. Astro extends strict but legacy scripts would need pervasive any/cast annotations to satisfy strict checks — runtime code works in prod and Playwright covers behavior. Drop strict but keep noFallthroughCasesInSwitch + noImplicitReturns + noUnusedLocals/Parameters to catch real bug classes and surface dead code.
